assertions.title: Tags created from article keywords on save

steps.action: Create article test-article-a in /admin/articles/new with keywords: test-shared, test-multi, test-dupe
steps.expected: Saving article creates corresponding tags and article_tags links
steps.observed: Article saved as id=20; tags rows exist and article_tags links exist for all three keywords

evidence.network: POST /api/admin/articles executed via UI save; supplemental API evidence in delete-api-responses.txt and tag-related-check.txt

steps.action: Create article A (id=20) with multiple tags and article B (id=21) sharing two tags
steps.expected: One article can map to many tags; one tag can map to multiple articles
steps.observed: article 20 links to 3 tags; tag test-shared links to article 20 and 21; test-dupe links to article 20 and 21

evidence.network: UI saves for article ids 20 and 21 completed successfully

steps.action: Save two articles using shared keywords test-shared and test-dupe
steps.expected: Only one tags row per keyword; both articles linked through article_tags
steps.observed: tags table has exactly one row for each shared keyword; both article ids 20 and 21 are linked to same tag ids

evidence.network: UI save requests completed for both articles

assertions.title: Tag-based related articles

steps.action: Probe for a related-articles user surface/API using created shared-tag articles (20, 21)
steps.expected: A callable function/API returns related articles excluding the current article
steps.observed: No related-articles route exists in current server routes; GET /api/articles/20/related returns 404

evidence.dbChecks: articles-categories/art-delete-tags/tag-related-expected-sql.txt shows expected related candidate (article 21) if such function existed

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing related-articles user surface in this milestone build (no route/UI available to validate exclusion-of-self behavior).

assertions.title: Delete article removes record and associations

steps.action: Create delete-target article id=22 with category (cat_id=24), tags, and one attachment file
steps.expected: Delete operation has all association types to remove
steps.observed: Pre-delete checks confirmed article row, article2cat row, article_tags rows, attachments row, and uploads/22 file

steps.expected: Article row removed; junction rows removed; attachment file removed from disk
steps.observed: HTTP 200 delete success; article, article2cat, article_tags, and attachments rows all removed; uploads/22 directory removed

assertions.title: Tags deleted when article is deleted

steps.action: Delete article id=22 which had article_tags links
steps.expected: All article_tags rows for article 22 removed
steps.observed: Pre-delete had rows (22,19) and (22,22); post-delete article_tags query for tags_article_id=22 returned no rows

assertions.title: Delete article — invalid ID

steps.expected: 404 or redirect and no DB modification
steps.observed: Returned 400 Bad Request with {"error":"Invalid article ID"}

steps.expected: 404 or redirect and no DB modification
steps.observed: Returned 404 Not Found with {"error":"Article not found"}
article ids 20 and 21 remained in DB; namespace article count remained 2 after invalid delete attempts

assertions.issues: Non-numeric invalid-id path returns HTTP 400 instead of the contract's expected 404/redirect.

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests export returned an empty list for this SPA session, so request status/payload details were incomplete from browser-only capture.
frictions.resolution: Used authenticated curl captures for explicit status codes and response bodies (delete-api-responses.txt, tag-related-check.txt, network-category-create.txt).

blockers.description: No implemented related-articles user surface (route/UI/function output) was available to validate VAL-TAG-003 behavior in this build.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Probed /api/articles/20/related and searched server route sources for related route support; probe returned 404 and no route was found.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 5 passed, 1 failed, 1 blocked. Non-pass assertions: VAL-ART-041 failed because non-numeric delete returns 400 instead of expected 404/redirect; VAL-TAG-003 blocked because no related-articles user surface exists to validate exclusion-of-self behavior.
